overview.description: The PL Growth and Income ETF (PLGI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund invests in a focused portfolio of growth-oriented and income-producing equities, supported by selective fixed income exposure and option strategies. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation and income. PLGI was launched on Dec 10, 2025 and is issued by PL.
